sections.name: Officium
lines: Feria Secunda infra Hebdomadam I post Octavam Pentecostes

sections.name: Oratio
lines: O God, the Strength of all them that put their trust in thee, mercifully accept our prayers, and because through the weakness of our mortal nature we can do no good thing without thee, grant us the help of thy grace, that in keeping of thy commandments we may please thee, both in will and deed.

sections.name: Secreta
lines: Be appeased, O Lord, we beseech thee, and accept the victims we dedicate to thee, and grant that they may avail us for perpetual aid.

sections.name: Postcommunio
lines: Filled, O Lord, as we are with so great bounties, we beseech thee; that we may receive the gifts of salvation, and never cease from thy praise.
